# Automation and Agentic Workflows {#automation-agentic}

:::cdi-message
- **ID:** AI-008
- **Type:** Advanced Chapter
- **Audience:** Builders and workflow designers
- **Theme:** Automation requires boundaries, monitoring, and fallback plans
:::


Automation becomes useful when repeated tasks have clear inputs, outputs, and review rules.

Agentic workflows add planning, tool use, and multi-step execution.

They should be introduced gradually.

## Safe Automation Pattern

```text
Start manual
  -> standardize the workflow
  -> add AI assistance
  -> add evaluation
  -> automate low-risk steps
  -> monitor outputs
  -> keep human override
```
